descriptionEn:
рџЌЅпёЏ Fish Tavern FANARI is a traditional Greek seaside tavern located on the waterfront of Potamos Beach in Epanomi. Known for its fresh seafood and authentic local cuisine, the restaurant offers a genuine Greek dining experience with beautiful views across the Thermaic Gulf. Guests can enjoy freshly caught fish, seafood specialties, fish soups, traditional meze dishes, and Mediterranean-inspired recipes prepared with local ingredients. The relaxed atmosphere, sea breeze, and stunning sunset views make it an excellent choice for families, couples, and seafood lovers looking for an authentic taste of Greece.
